sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32570" key="e)kparapi/ptw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκπαραπίπτω</orth>, Astrol.,<sense id="n32570.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fail to combine,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:93:30" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">93.30</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
